languages.text: "Говорит Магос Логистикатор Тетрия-Лемма. Омниссия благословит! Неисчислимые вероятности путей вновь привели ваше судно к точке заключения Пакта ТР-3. Вы готовы согласиться?"

"Magos Logis Tetria-Lemma transmitting. Omnissiah's blessings! The incalculable probabilities of the paths have once again brought your vessel to the point of concluding Pact ТR-3. Are you willing to agree?"
languages.original_text: "Говорит Магос Логистикатор Тетрия-Лемма. Омниссия благословит! Неисчислимые вероятности путей вновь привели ваше судно к точке заключения Пакта ТР-3. Вы готовы согласиться?"

traits.locale_text: "Magos Logis Tetria-Lemma transmitting. Omnissiah's blessings! The incalculable probabilities of the paths have once again brought your vessel to the point of concluding Pact ТR-3. Are you willing to agree?"

"Magos Logis Tetria-Lemma transmitting. Omnissiah's blessings! The incalculable probabilities of the paths have once again brought your vessel to the point of concluding Pact ТR-3. Are you willing to agree?"

"Magos Logis Tetria-Lemma transmitting. Omnissiah's blessings! The incalculable probabilities of the paths have once again brought your vessel to the point of concluding Pact ТR-3. Are you willing to agree?"

languages.text: 「マゴス・ロギス・テトリア・レマが送信中。オムニシアの祝福あれ！道の数え切れない確率が、あなたの船を再び契約TR-3を結ぶ地点に導きました。契約を結ぶ意思はありますか？」
languages.original_text: "Magos Logis Tetria-Lemma transmitting. Omnissiah's blessings! The incalculable probabilities of the paths have once again brought your vessel to the point of concluding Pact ТR-3. Are you willing to agree?"

traits.locale_text: 「マゴス・ロギス・テトリア・レマが送信中。オムニシアの祝福あれ！道の数え切れない確率が、あなたの船を再び契約TR-3を結ぶ地点に導きました。契約を結ぶ意思はありますか？」

languages.text: «Magos logos Tetria-Lemma transmitiendo. ¡Que el Omnissiah le bendiga! Las probabilidades incalculables de los caminos vuelven a traer su nave al momento de concluir el pacto CI-3. ¿Está dispuest{mf|o|a} a aceptar?».
languages.original_text: "Magos Logis Tetria-Lemma transmitting. Omnissiah's blessings! The incalculable probabilities of the paths have once again brought your vessel to the point of concluding Pact ТR-3. Are you willing to agree?"

traits.locale_text: «Magos logos Tetria-Lemma transmitiendo. ¡Que el Omnissiah le bendiga! Las probabilidades incalculables de los caminos vuelven a traer su nave al momento de concluir el pacto CI-3. ¿Está dispuest{mf|o|a} a aceptar?».

languages.text: "Hier Magos Logis Tetria-Lemma. Der Omnissiah segne Euch! Die unkalkulierbaren Wahrscheinlichkeiten der Pfade haben Euer Schiff erneut an den Punkt geführt, Pakt TR-3 abzuschließen. Werdet Ihr zustimmen?"
languages.original_text: "Magos Logis Tetria-Lemma transmitting. Omnissiah's blessings! The incalculable probabilities of the paths have once again brought your vessel to the point of concluding Pact ТR-3. Are you willing to agree?"

traits.locale_text: "Hier Magos Logis Tetria-Lemma. Der Omnissiah segne Euch! Die unkalkulierbaren Wahrscheinlichkeiten der Pfade haben Euer Schiff erneut an den Punkt geführt, Pakt TR-3 abzuschließen. Werdet Ihr zustimmen?"

languages.text: « Ici le magos logis Tetria-Lemma. Puisse l'Omnimessie vous bénir ! Les probabilités incalculables des voies nous ont encore une fois menées jusqu'à votre vaisseau, afin de conclure le pacte TR-3. Approuvez-vous cet accord ? »
languages.original_text: "Magos Logis Tetria-Lemma transmitting. Omnissiah's blessings! The incalculable probabilities of the paths have once again brought your vessel to the point of concluding Pact ТR-3. Are you willing to agree?"

traits.locale_text: « Ici le magos logis Tetria-Lemma. Puisse l'Omnimessie vous bénir ! Les probabilités incalculables des voies nous ont encore une fois menées jusqu'à votre vaisseau, afin de conclure le pacte TR-3. Approuvez-vous cet accord ? »

languages.text: “逻辑士贤者特特里亚-莱玛传讯。欧姆尼赛亚赐福！诸路径的不可测概率再次将您的舰船引至缔结TR-3协议的节点。您是否同意？”
languages.original_text: "Magos Logis Tetria-Lemma transmitting. Omnissiah's blessings! The incalculable probabilities of the paths have once again brought your vessel to the point of concluding Pact ТR-3. Are you willing to agree?"

traits.locale_text: “逻辑士贤者特特里亚-莱玛传讯。欧姆尼赛亚赐福！诸路径的不可测概率再次将您的舰船引至缔结TR-3协议的节点。您是否同意？”

languages.text: "Magos Logis Tetria-Lemma iletmiş. Hermesih sizi kutsasın! Yolların hesaplanamaz olasılıkları, geminizi bir kez daha TR-3 Paktı'nı akdetme noktasına getirdi. Kabul etmeye istekli misiniz?"
languages.original_text: "Magos Logis Tetria-Lemma transmitting. Omnissiah's blessings! The incalculable probabilities of the paths have once again brought your vessel to the point of concluding Pact ТR-3. Are you willing to agree?"
